environment: deployed user app and deployed Render backend
action: Use the valid token received by email on the correct deployed user-app URL, set a temporary new password, and log in with that password.
expected: The password is updated and the user can log in with the new password.
actual: Password reset completed and the deployed home screen loaded after login with the temporary new password.
cleanup: Restored demo@example.com and password123, then verified login with the restored credentials.
